text.title: pm-framework-focus-areas Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-framework-focus-areas as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Listing all 40 non-prescriptive processes in the project plan when only 8-12 apply.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Full process lists inflate documentation cost and imply mandatory compliance; cap with explicit tailoring decisions.

failure-mode.description: Emitting "Stakeholder phase complete" or "Team phase done" — treating domains as phases.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Performance domains are ongoing concerns, not sequential phases; "complete" is never valid for a domain.

failure-mode.description: Skipping the Initiating focus area on internal projects ("we already started").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No charter or decision record means no traceable rationale for scope and constraints; gap surfaces during audits and change requests.

failure-mode.description: Including Procurement under Executing and dropping it when no contractors exist — then adding it back when contractors appear mid-project.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Procurement must be evaluated at Initiating/Planning; retroactive addition after kickoff disrupts cost and schedule baselines.
